other_findings.finding: c1 is at the origin of dual inferred differentiation trajectories from basal keratinocytes into terminally differentiated keratinocytes expressing CNFN, FLG and IVL. One trajectory arm expresses high levels of lamellar body-related transcripts (ABCA12, CKAP4, CLIP1), while the other expresses lower levels. IRF1 and SOX9 are transcription factors differentially expressed between the two pathways.
Reynolds adult skin supplements (PMC7611557) were not accessible through PMC supplemental material API. Evidence was derived from the full text PDF of the paper.

evidence_quotes.quote: We characterized four groups of keratinocytes: undifferentiated, proliferating, differentiated and inflammatory differentiated cells (Differentiated KC*)
evidence_quotes.context: Keratinocyte classification in adult skin atlas

evidence_quotes.quote: Undifferentiated keratinocytes transcribe basal epidermal proteins (KRT5, KRT14) and are abundant in the CD49fhi FACS gate
evidence_quotes.context: Marker gene identification for undifferentiated keratinocytes

evidence_quotes.quote: Force-directed graph (FDG) and PAGA analyses reveal dual inferred differentiation trajectories from the stem cell genes (TP63, PPP3CA and CAV1/2)-enriched basal keratinocytes into terminally differentiated keratinocytes expressing CNFN, FLG and IVL
